name: Victoria's Secret & Co.
business: Victoria's Secret & Co. is a specialty retailer of women's intimates and other apparel and beauty products marketed under the Victoria's Secret, PINK, and Adore Me brand names. The company operates approximately 860 company-operated stores in the U.S., Canada, and China, as well as digital channels and over 560 partner-operated stores in about 70 countries. It is the world's largest intimate apparel company.
sellsTo: International customers through franchise, license, wholesale, and joint venture partners

exposures.sentence: Victoria s Secret & Co. (together with its subsidiaries unless the context otherwise requires, we , us , our or the Company ) is a specialty retailer of women s intimates and other apparel and beauty products marketed under the Victoria s Secret, PINK and Adore Me brand names.
In fiscal 2025, approximately 31% of our total net revenue was derived from our digital channels, including our websites and mobile applications.

Our information technology systems, as well as those of our and our third-party service providers and vendors, are vulnerable to damage, interruption or breach from a variety of sources, including cyberattacks, rans
our long-term strategic growth plan and strategic initiatives include investments in information technology, data science and artificial intelligence (AI).

If we are unable to incorporate artificial intelligence and other emerging technological applications into our business operations successfully and ethically, our business, reputation and results of operations may be adversely affected.
